steps.title: Translate each fact
steps.content:
$x$ = length, $y$ = height.

"Height is 61 inches" → $y = 61$.
"Length is 3 times its height" → $x = 3y$.

steps.title: Match the system
steps.content:
System: $\{x = 3y,\ y = 61\}$.

A and B reverse the relationship ($y = 3x$ would mean height is 3× length). C uses $x = 61$, conflating length with the given height value.

That is the correct answer.
